---
title: "Calcbench"
page-layout: article
---

# Calcbench

## Description

Financial statement database built from SEC XBRL filings of public companies. Supports accounting, auditing, financial analysis, and corporate reporting research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, News & Current Events
- **Access model:** Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, News & Current Events

## Access notes

Requires users to register for an individual account with a Yale email address for access.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://web.library.yale.edu/access-calcbench)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
